name: lich-rubric
description: M7 Zheng Pairwise Rubric Judgment. 5-axis LLM-as-judge scoring (Clarity, Correctness-at-glance, Idiom-fit, Testability, Simplicity) with position-swap debiasing and Cohen's Kappa inter-judge reliability. Catches style/idiom/clarity signals static engines miss. Sonnet default judge; Haiku under Pech budget pressure; Opus for disagreement adjudication.
